EmailTemplate.description: Response to request for IR35 Tool link.
EmailTemplate.name: IR35 - Tool Link
EmailTemplate.subject: IR35 - Tool Link
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Please see the below link which will prompt you to re-set your password and allow you to log into the Kingsbridge IR35 Status Review tool: https://kingsbridge.ir35.io/forgot-password
Please ensure you log in before completing a review to avoid being prompted to make payment.
If you have any further queries, please feel free to give us a call on 01242 808 740 or reply by email.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
